overview: Forum Functional Health offers functional medicine services in McKinney, TX, using advanced lab testing and personalized wellness plans to identify root causes of health issues. The practice specializes in restoring balance to hormonal, digestive, and detoxification systems.
highlights: Comprehensive IV therapy services including NAD+, Glutathione, and specialized infusions
Advanced lab testing with personalized wellness protocols
Specializes in hormonal balance, digestive health, and thyroid function
targetAudience: Individuals with hormonal imbalances, chronic fatigue, or digestive issues seeking root-cause functional medicine approaches.
